title: pyrus genesis
side_effects: Pyrus genesis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Overexposure to the plant's volatile oils can also lead to respiratory problems, such as difficulty breathing and coughing. In severe cases, improper use of Pyrus genesis can result in cardiac arrhythmias and decreased blood pressure, potentially causing dizziness and fainting. Furthermore, long-term exposure to the plant's toxins may increase the risk of developing certain types of cancer.
